message:
Add per-chat error suppression: log once, then at powers of 2

Prevents a single broken chat (e.g., Beeper API 500 for a specific
chat) from flooding the daemon log every poll cycle. Logs the first
occurrence, then at 2, 4, 8, 16... Prints recovery message when
a previously-failing chat syncs successfully.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
